inAppHint.body: Tap the menu (⋮) in your browser and choose 'Open in browser' to open Zalo properly.

founder.title: Built by a founder, for Vietnamese centers
founder.paragraph1: I'm Matthew, based in Hai Phong.
founder.paragraph2: I built Klazly after watching English centers around me struggle with the same thing: chaotic Zalo groups, parents asking "what did my child learn today?" over and over, and owners with no time to answer each one.
founder.paragraph3: Right now I'm looking for 5 centers in Vietnam to build this product with me. I call them Founding Centers. In exchange, these centers get:
founder.benefit2: Setup help and teacher guidance over Zalo
founder.benefit3: Founding Center pricing locked forever (about 50% off)
founder.benefit4: Direct influence on what I build next
founder.closing: I'm one person. If something breaks, you message me directly on Zalo — not a support queue. Same channel if you want to talk.
founder.fullHeadline: Cohort is full. Join the waitlist.
founder.openSubtext: Hand-picked pilot centers, locked discounted rate forever.
founder.fullSubtext: All current Founding spots filled. Message me to join the waitlist for the next cohort.
founder.loginTagline: Built in Hai Phong for Vietnamese English centers.
founder.pricingPanelSubtitle: Five hand-picked centers helping shape the product. Once these spots are gone, the next cohort opens later.

founding.fullHeadline: Cohort is full. Join the waitlist.

landing.title: Klazly
landing.tagline: The management platform for English centers in Vietnam.
landing.heroTitle: Run a more professional English center.
landing.heroSubtitle: A management platform for English centers in Vietnam. Your teachers log lessons in a minute; parents read them on Zalo. You finally have one place for it all instead of fifteen Zalo group chats.
landing.audienceSubtitle: Center owners, teachers, and parents each get a view built around the job they need to do. Same data, three different jobs.
landing.audienceOwnerDesc: You see which teachers are logging consistently and which aren't. You track homework completion and behavior across the week. Everything to do with classes, students, and parents lives in one place instead of in your head.
landing.audienceOwnerBullet1: Center-wide analytics on a single dashboard
landing.audienceOwnerBullet2: Spot teachers who haven't logged this week
landing.audienceOwnerBullet3: Your logo and letterhead on every report
landing.audienceTeacherDesc: After class your teacher opens the app on their phone, logs the lesson once for the whole class, then quick-rates each student. No paper. No mixing work into their personal Zalo.
landing.audienceParentDesc: Parents sign in on their phone (phone number is fine, no email needed). They see what their child learned today, how the homework went, and how the teacher rated behavior. One tap downloads a PDF with your center's letterhead to share with grandparents.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Six things you'll use from day one.
landing.feat1Title: Branded PDF reports in one tap
landing.feat1Body: Every parent gets a beautifully designed monthly report. Your center's branding, your teacher's voice, your child's progress. Parents screenshot the highlights to forward to family — free marketing for you.
landing.feat1B1: Branded with your center's logo and colors
landing.feat1B2: Rich lesson detail: vocabulary, grammar, teacher's notes
landing.feat1B3: Auto-generated highlights parents share with family
landing.feat1B4: Bilingual: parents pick VI or EN
landing.feat2Title: Parents open their phone, see today's lesson in seconds
landing.feat2Body: Parents don't have to scroll through Zalo groups or message the teacher again. They sign in and the vocabulary, grammar, homework, and notes for their child are right there.
landing.feat2B3: Sign in by phone number (no email needed)
landing.feat3Title: Know instantly which teachers are behind on logging
landing.feat3Body: Owner analytics show who's keeping up and who's slipping. So when you talk to a teacher about consistency, you have real data instead of a feeling.
landing.feat3B1: Count lessons logged per week per teacher
landing.feat3B2: Red flag for teachers with 0 lessons this week
landing.feat3B3: Attendance and homework trends by class, by student
landing.feat4Title: Reports go straight into Zalo in one tap
landing.feat4Body: Vietnamese parents live on Zalo. Every PDF report has a Share via Zalo button built in. Nothing for your parents to install, nothing to teach them.
landing.feat4B1: Built-in Zalo share on every report
landing.feat4B2: Parents get it in Zalo (no separate app needed)
landing.feat4B3: Easy to forward to grandparents or family
landing.feat5Title: Vietnamese to English in one click
landing.feat5Body: Got foreign teachers? The English UI is built in. Parents read reports in Vietnamese while teachers log in English; the whole app switches with one toggle.
landing.feat5B1: Every button, label, and message is bilingual
landing.feat5B2: Vietnamese is the default for parents
landing.feat5B3: Works well for centers with native English teachers
landing.feat6Title: Your center's data, only your center sees it
landing.feat6Body: Every center's data is fully isolated. No other center can read or interfere with yours, even though we all run on the same platform. The isolation is enforced at the database layer (Supabase Row Level Security), not just hidden in the UI.
landing.feat6B1: Supabase RLS — access control at the DB layer
landing.feat6B2: Daily backups, hosted on Vercel + Supabase
landing.howSubtitle: From signup to your first parent report in three steps.
landing.howStep1Title: Sign up and set up your center
landing.howStep1Body: Enter your center name, upload your logo, customise the report. 5 minutes.
landing.howStep2Body: Add them one at a time, or bulk-import from CSV. Parents can sign in by phone number; email isn't required.
landing.howStep3Title: Teachers log lessons; parents see them instantly
landing.howStep3Body: After class, your teacher logs the lesson in 60 seconds. Parents sign in and see their child's progress right away.
landing.howFooter: Most centers welcome their first parents within an hour of signing up.
landing.compareSubtitle: Running your center on Zalo plus Excel right now? Most centers I talk to are in the same spot.
landing.compareWithout1: Zalo messages mixed between parents, teachers, and personal life
landing.compareWithout2: Parents ask what their child learned; teachers reply individually
landing.compareWithout3: No idea which teachers are logging lessons consistently
landing.compareWithout4: Month-end means hand-writing reports for every parent
landing.compareWithout5: Parents don't see the value, hard to retain, hard to raise prices
landing.compareWith1: Messages organised per student, private and searchable
landing.compareWith2: Parents read reports themselves; no need to ask teachers
landing.compareWith3: Analytics show who's behind and who's on track
landing.compareWith4: PDF reports auto-generated; you just preview and send
landing.compareWith5: Parents see value every week, so retention and price-raising both get easier
landing.pricingLockInTitle: Lock in this rate for as long as you stay subscribed
landing.pricingLockInBody: These are launch rates while we're still new. Prices will go up as I add features, but anyone who signs on during launch keeps their current rate for as long as they stay subscribed.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Pay month-to-month while you try it, or commit to a longer plan and save.
landing.pricingMonthlyNote: Works out to 900,000 VNĐ / month. You save 1,800,000 VNĐ versus paying monthly.
landing.pricingAnnualNote: Pay yearly and save 4,500,000 VNĐ versus paying monthly. Plus you lock in launch pricing.
landing.pricingNote: Founding Center pricing locked forever. Every plan includes:
landing.pricingItem4: Zalo / email support and free updates
landing.pricingTrialInline: Cancel anytime · Setup help over Zalo

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything centers ask before they sign up.
faq.a1: Yes. You can cancel anytime by messaging me on Zalo. Your account stays active through the end of the period you've already paid for.
faq.a2: Bank transfer, Momo, ZaloPay, or VNPay. I'll send payment details on Zalo after we discuss which plan fits your center.
faq.q3: Do you provide an invoice (hóa đơn)?
faq.a3: Yes, e-invoice (hóa đơn điện tử) is provided on request for every payment.
faq.a4: Yes. Upgrade or change plans by messaging me on Zalo. Founding Center pricing stays locked if you upgrade to a longer commitment.
faq.a5: Most centers are fully set up in under 30 minutes. For Founding Centers I help walk through setup and teacher onboarding over Zalo.
faq.a6: Teachers only need to know 3 buttons to log a lesson. For Founding Centers I walk them through it over Zalo, about 30 minutes.
faq.q7: Can parents use it without downloading an app?
faq.a7: Yes. Parents receive reports via Zalo or open them in a web browser. No app installation needed.
faq.a8: Yes. Each center's data is fully isolated, so no center can see another center's information. All connections are encrypted.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data Klazly (the Service) collects, why, and how it is handled.
privacy.whoBody: The Operator is Matthew Stadler, an individual based in Vietnam, who designs and runs the Service. The Service is hosted on Vercel (web hosting) and Supabase (Postgres database, authentication, file storage). Data is stored in their US / EU data centers.
privacy.dataBody: Center admins, teachers, parents and students each have an account with name, email, role and a link to their center. Lessons recorded by teachers are stored. Centers also have a name, contact info, optional logo, and subscription status. The Service is NOT designed for sensitive data — do not enter health records, ID/passport numbers, banking credentials, or anything similar.
privacy.useTitle: What we do with the data
privacy.useBody: Store it for the center to view and use, scoped per-center via Row Level Security so no center can see another center's data. Display it to the relevant users (admin sees their center; teachers see their classes; parents see their own children). Generate the printable PDF report when a parent requests it. Operate the Service: routine logging, backups. We do NOT sell or rent any data, do NOT use it for advertising, and do NOT train AI/ML models on it.
privacy.shareTitle: Who else can see the data
privacy.shareBody: Vercel processes requests as they pass through their hosting. Supabase stores the database, authentication records, and uploaded files. Both are bound by their own privacy commitments. We do not transfer data to any other third party.
privacy.retentionBody: While the center's subscription is active, all data is retained. After cancellation, data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted. Encrypted infrastructure backups may persist for up to 90 days.
privacy.rightsBody: You can ask the Operator to: see what data we hold about you; correct inaccurate data; export your data as CSV; delete your account and associated data. Email matthewstadlers14@gmail.com from the email on file. We will respond within 14 days.
privacy.securityBody: All connections to the Service use HTTPS. Passwords are hashed (we cannot read them). Data isolation between centers is enforced at the database row level (Row Level Security).
privacy.childrenBody: Students are typically minors. They do not have their own accounts — only their parent has an account on their behalf. Centers are responsible for obtaining parental consent under Vietnamese law before adding students to the Service.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By creating or using a Klazly center account you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.serviceBody: Klazly is a hosted web platform that allows English language centers in Vietnam to record lessons and share progress with parents. The Service is licensed, not sold. The Owner retains full ownership of the software, source code, brand marks, database schema, and documentation.
terms.payBody: The Service is offered on 1-month, 6-month, or 12-month prepaid plans, paid by bank transfer or VN e-wallet (Momo / ZaloPay / VNPay). Pricing is published at the website and may change for new subscriptions; existing subscriptions stay at the price they signed. Onboarding trial periods, if any, are set on a per-customer basis. Refunds are not offered for unused portions unless the Owner agrees otherwise.
terms.subTitle: Subscriber responsibilities
terms.subBody: Keep admin credentials confidential. Only enter data the Subscriber has the right to enter. Do not enter sensitive data the Service is not designed for (e.g. health records, banking credentials). Use the Service only for the lawful purpose of running an English language center.
terms.dataBody: Data you enter belongs to you. The Owner holds it on your behalf while your subscription is active. You can request a CSV export of all your data at any time. The Owner will deliver it within 14 days at no charge. After cancellation, your data is retained for 30 days then permanently deleted.
terms.licenseBody: The Owner grants the Subscriber a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the hosted Service while the subscription is active. The Subscriber may not copy, modify, redistribute, sublicense, reverse-engineer, or build a competing product from the Service.
terms.termBody: The Owner may suspend or terminate access if the Subscriber fails to pay an invoice for more than 30 days past due, or breaches these Terms or the License, or uploads content that violates Vietnamese law or third-party rights. The Subscriber may cancel at any time; the current paid period remains usable; no refund for unused portion.
terms.warrantyBody: The Service is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Owner is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, lost profits, or lost data. The Owner's total liability for any claim is capped at the amount the Subscriber paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.lawBody: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. Any dispute will be resolved in good faith between the parties; if unresolved, the Subscriber's local court has jurisdiction.

import.title: CSV import
import.subtitle: Bulk-upload parents and students instead of adding them one by one.
import.parentsHelp: CSV with 4 columns: full_name, email, phone, password. Each row needs at least an email or a phone. Password can be blank — the system will generate a random one. Phone accepts 0901234567, +84901234567, or formats with spaces / dashes.
import.parentsPasswordNote: Note: if you leave password blank, the system generates a temporary password for each parent — capture it before leaving the page. Parents can reset their own password later via the "Forgot password?" link on the login page.
import.studentsHelp: CSV with 4 columns: full_name, age, class_name, parent_email. Class name must match an existing class. Parent email must match an existing parent.
import.studentsNote: Tip: create parents first, then classes, then import students.
import.rowMissingContact: Each parent needs an email or phone.
import.duplicateInFile: Email or phone already appears on row {row}.
import.generatedHelp: These rows had no password in the CSV so we generated one. Save this list (Zalo, email, paper) — you can't see these again after you leave the page.

superAdmin.planHint: Leave blank while the center is on trial. Update when they convert to a paid tier.
superAdmin.planTypeHint: Internal classification — never shown to the customer. Founding Centers get the locked discounted rate; Design Partners are free-forever.
superAdmin.sourceOtherPlaceholder: How did they hear about us?
superAdmin.foundingFootnote: Founding Center program is internal only — never shown on the public landing or pricing page.
superAdmin.createSubtitle: Create the center and its first admin user in one step.
superAdmin.createdHint: Created center {center}. The admin can log in with {email}.
superAdmin.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete center {name} and ALL its data (teachers, parents, classes, students, lessons)? This cannot be undone.
superAdmin.expiredHint: They still have all their data — a quick Zalo nudge often wins these back.
superAdmin.convertDialogDescription: Pick the plan they're paying for. We'll mark today as the start date and set the next billing date automatically.
superAdmin.extendDialogDescription: Push the trial end date forward. If the trial already lapsed, the new end date is counted from today.
superAdmin.lockDialogDescription: Users at this center will see the lock screen on their next page load. Their data is preserved — unlock by clicking Reactivate later.
superAdmin.reactivateDialogDescription: Re-opens access immediately with a 7-day courtesy trial. You can extend further or convert to paid after they get back in.
